title: task
description: dispatch.rs:138-140 - Request::from_coap silently drops URI path segments beyond MAX_PATH_DEPTH (4). A request to /a/b/c/d/e would be parsed as /a/b/c/d with path_len=4. If a resource is registered for /a/b/c/d, the request incorrectly matches. Failure scenario: Client sends GET /config/sensors/zone1/temp/history, server has resource at /config/sensors/zone1/temp, request matches wrong resource due to truncation.
close_reason: Fixed: Added conditional logging (defmt/log) in Request::from_coap to warn when URI path segments beyond MAX_PATH_DEPTH are dropped
